Journal Article · Journal of Hazardous Materials, 442, 130089

Amphiphilic Ligand In Situ Assembly of Uranyl Active Sites and Selective Interactions of Molybdenum Disulfide

Yuhui Liu, Yaning Lu, Shuang Zhang, Xiaoyan Li, Zhibin Zhang, Liya Ge, Mengyu Chang*, Yunhai Liu*, Grzegorz Lisak, and Sheng Deng*

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

A study on amphiphilic ligand in situ assembly of uranyl active sites and selective interactions with molybdenum disulfide.

Highlights

  • Corresponding-author work in environmental materials.
  • Studies selective interactions involving uranyl active sites and MoS2.

Add environmental-remediation context and materials characterization details here.

Citation

Yuhui Liu et al. Amphiphilic Ligand In Situ Assembly of Uranyl Active Sites and Selective Interactions of Molybdenum Disulfide. J. Hazard. Mater. 2023, 442, 130089.
